title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: PARKROSE HIGH SCHOOL SBHC OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 12003 NE Shaver Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Individuals with an income below 250% Federal Poverty Level Hours: Monday 8:45am-4:45pm, Tuesday-Friday 7:45am-3:45pm (503) 988-3392 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 988-3392 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 7:45am-1pm and 1:30pm-3:45pm Thursday 9:15am-1:30pm and 2pm-5:15pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus 22, 71 Max: Blue line to 122nd Ave. Station (transfer to 71). Located on north side of building in back next to gymnasium entrance. Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PARKROSE HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
